channel.title: CarShake Blog
channel.description: Valet damage proof, vehicle handover tips, and legal guides from CarShake.

item.title: The 3-Stop Valet Handover Protocol
item.description: The complete 3-step protocol for documenting your car's condition at valet drop-off and pickup.

item.title: Bailment Law: Your Legal Rights at Valet
item.description: Understanding bailment law and how it protects you when a valet damages your car.

item.title: Valet Damage by City: Where It Happens Most
item.description: Analysis of valet damage patterns across major US cities.

item.title: The Ultimate Guide to Valet Damage Proof
item.description: Everything you need to know about proving valet parking damage: the legal framework, the 3-stop protocol, and how to never pay for damage you didn't cause.

item.title: The Valet Damage Report 2026
item.description: Our comprehensive data study on valet damage patterns, costs, and city-level risk across the United States.

item.title: Free Valet Damage Claim Letter Generator
item.description: Generate a ready-to-send demand letter citing bailment law in 60 seconds. Free, no signup.

item.title: How to Dispute Valet Damage and Win
item.description: Step-by-step guide to disputing valet parking damage: document, report, demand letter, small claims.
